MICHAEL SMITH, 734-7491, PLAINTIFF AND RESPONDING PARTY APPEARING IN PRO PER
CARA CHING-SENAHA FROM JACKSON LEWIS LLP, 394-9400, APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS AND MOVING PARTIES

MATTER WAS ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS MICHELE MODENA AND SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S Special Anti-Slapp Motion To Strike Complaint Under CCP Section 425.16 IS DENIED. PROTECTED ACTIVITY IS ALLEGED NOT AS A BASIS FOR THE CLAIM OR ITS GRAVAMAN, BUT ONLY AS A LINK OF THE CHAIN OF THE ALLEGED DAMAGE. THE MOTION FOR REQUEST FOR PLAINTIFF TO BE DESIGNATED A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT IS DENIED BECAUSE BY SECOND ACTION HE HAS NOT REPORTEDLY FILED FRIVOLOUS CLAIMS.
